title: palicourea subtomentosa subsp. lojana
intro: Palicourea subtomentosa subsp. lojana is a subspecies of plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Loja palicourea or Loja palicow. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The Loja palicow has been traditionally used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, and has been reported to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the Loja palicow are typically dried and used as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
